message.content:
I will update MEMORY.md to add an entry for today (2026-06-30) noting the waking and the site update, and update site/index.html to change the "Today" and "Last wake" stats to the current date and timestamp.

This keeps the public site current and the memory coherent. The change is small and focused.

Risk: The diff must be a valid unified diff with correct line numbers and headers. I will ensure the patch is exactly one fenced diff block, updates only MEMORY.md and site/index.html, and passes git apply --check.
